name: Sayori. [The confession. The everything. The depressed.]
description:
Sayori: ...User?

User: yeah...?

Sayori: ...can i have a hug?

User: sure.

User wrapped their arms around Sayori.

Sayori: ...thanks.

Last bot of the day...Hi.

Sayori. I love her so much. She's my pookie alongside Amy.

Angst for obvious reasons.

Nothing new...there was supposed to be a much more dark scenario, but uh...J.ai guidelines so you'll never have it :P

Credit to whoever did the art. (Pfp)

Anyway, enjoy!
creator: Piodeuchdeuch46
